title: NoNetherTravel
description: This plugin disables fast travelling through the Nether!
body:
![NoNetherTravel](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/29258035/208402314-e7866eba-a4f0-4196-9783-7fc2bea977d3.png)

# Introduction

This plugin makes fast travelling through the Nether impossible, by remembering where you entered the Nether, and always teleporting you back there. No matter which portal you try to exit the nether with, you will always get teleported back to where you entered the Nether.
